notes: v255 — The quick filters along the top (Gainers, Losers, Vol ≥200%, Accum?, Up 2+ Days, Bullish, Bearish) now narrow whatever you're looking at, not just the main table. Open your watchlist and tap Vol ≥200% — you'll see just those shares, with the count reading '3 of 21 · quick filters on'. They work live in the Top 20 to Watch panel too (original ranks kept, and Save CSV / Print / Add-to-watchlist act on exactly what you're seeing), in the simple-mode report popups, and the Volume Surge Report respects them when it's generated. Tap 'Showing' at any time to clear them everywhere. Also fixed: a quick filter could get stuck after closing a report window — untoggling now always brings the full list back.
